title: Rmp
compiled_truth: Rmp is an external contact at [Cpuc](companies/cpuc). Over the corpus period (1999-09-24 to 2001-10-24), Rmp sent 5 and received 272 emails, totalling 277 interactions. Top correspondents: [Paulamirault](people/paulamirault-aec) (4), [Craigc](people/craigc-calpine) (4), [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (4), [Lindseyhowdowning](people/lindseyhowdowning-dwt) (4), [Jleslie](people/jleslie-luce) (3).
